changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description = 'Liquide de ponction'

changeSet.comment: Associer 5 tests de microscopie au type d'échantillon Liquide de ponction (sampletype_test)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.sampletype_test (id, sample_type_id, test_id) SELECT nextval('clinlims.sample_type_test_seq'), tos.id, t.id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample tos CROSS JOIN clinlims.test t WHERE tos.description = 'Liquide de ponction' AND t.name IN ( 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Hématies', 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Leucocytes', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Polynucléaires', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Lymphocytes', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.sampletype_test st WHERE st.sample_type_id = tos.id AND st.test_id = t.id );

changeSet.author: pkomena

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.panel WHERE name IN ('ECBU','ECB-LCR','ECB-LP')

changeSet.comment: Associer 5 tests de microscopie aux panels ECBU, ECB-LCR et ECB-LP (panel_item)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.panel_item (id, panel_id, test_id, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.panel_item_seq'), p.id, t.id, NOW() FROM clinlims.panel p CROSS JOIN clinlims.test t WHERE p.name IN ('ECBU','ECB-LCR','ECB-LP') AND t.name IN ( 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Hématies', 'Microscopie - Etat frais Quantitatif - Leucocytes', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Polynucléaires', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Lymphocytes', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.panel_item pi WHERE pi.panel_id = p.id AND pi.test_id = t.id );
